\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5705 introduces Omega Gyro Tunnel Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \boxed{\frac{\omega_{gyro}\hbar}{k_B T} > 1 \quad \text{AND} \quad \frac{\Gamma_{tunnel}}{\gamma_{decoherence}} > 1 \quad \text{AND} \quad \mathcal{H}_{total} \neq 0} $$
